caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts uniform performs a staff routine on a blue mat inside a large, illuminated hall. He is positioned in the center of the space, with a crowd of spectators seated behind him in the background. In the beginning, he stands in a wide stance, holding a wooden staff horizontally in front of him. He then shifts his weight and rotates his body, swinging the staff in a wide arc. He continues the movement, bringing the staff across his body while maintaining a low, balanced posture. Throughout the sequence, the man focuses on his form and precision, while the audience watches silently from their seats. The setting is formal, featuring high ceilings with recessed lighting and decorative chandeliers. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
